name: Alcohol
description: Alcoholic beverages. Campaigns promoting beer, wine, spirits, or alcohol brands.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US TTB Advertising Regulations
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Federal Trade Commission and TTB regulate alcohol advertising. Industry self-regulation requires 71.6% adult audience threshold.

regulatory_frameworks.name: UK ASA Code
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Prohibits alcohol ads that appeal to under-18s, link alcohol to social or sexual success, or encourage irresponsible consumption.

guidance: Age-gating is the primary governance concern. Most jurisdictions require 21+ (US) or 18+ (EU/UK) audience targeting. Some platforms impose stricter requirements than the regulation mandates.
